{{Quote|Wessel is a fool.|[[Carnor Jax]]|<ref name="CE5">[[Crimson Empire 5|''Crimson Empire'' 5]]</ref>}}
'''Redd Wessel''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who served as an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[General/Legends|general]] under [[Carnor Jax]] of the [[Crimson Empire]].

==Biography==
===Early life and career===
Redd Wessel was the son of [[Marcellin Wessel]], one of the first [[Moff/Legends|Moffs]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]].<ref name="CSWE" /> From a young age, he dreamed of serving in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. However, upon attending the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]], he was determined to be better suited as an [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]].<ref name="Handbook 2">[[Star Wars Handbook 2: Crimson Empire|''Star Wars Handbook'' 2: ''Crimson Empire'']]</ref>

Serving as a soldier for Imperial ground-based operations, Wessel came to the attention of his superiors during the Empire's cleansing of [[Yinchorr/Legends|Yinchorr]]. He was steadily promoted through the ranks before reaching the rank of [[General/Legends|general]] thanks to his by-the-book approach to strategy and command.<ref name="Handbook 2" />

===Serving Carnor Jax===
After failing to find ways to advance his career further, Wessel seized an opportunity to do so by siding with [[Carnor Jax]] and the members of the [[Imperial Ruling Council/Legends|Imperial Ruling Council]], and helping them with sabotaging the [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] bodies of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]. After Palpatine's demise, Wessel helped Jax take control of the Ruling Council and declare himself ruler. Wessel was subsequently named as Jax's right-hand man, tasked with directing the Empire's military operations.<ref name="Handbook 2" />

[[File:Wessel.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Wessel's final moments.]]

It was not long before Jax realized that Wessel lacked the vision that Jax demanded of his high-ranking officers, and Wessel endured constant criticism from the self-declared Emperor as a result.<ref name="Handbook 2" />

General Redd Wessel was killed aboard the Imperial Star Destroyer ''[[Emperor's Revenge]]'' when a [[Scimitar assault bomber]], bomb-rigged by Jax's nemesis [[Kir Kanos]], was brought aboard, where it exploded, killing everyone aboard and gutting the greater part of the ship.<ref name="CE5" />

{{Stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
General Wessel was played by [[David Anthony Brinkley]] for the [[Crimson Empire (audio drama)|audio drama version of ''Crimson Empire'']].
